headline: Workday Founder Returns As CEO While AI Focus Shapes Valuation Outlook
summary: Workday co founder Aneel Bhusri is returning as CEO following the resignation of Carl Eschenbach. The leadership change comes as Workday increases its focus on artificial intelligence across its enterprise software products. The company is responding to sector wide questions about AI, including regulatory attention on potential bias in hiring algorithms. For investors watching NasdaqGS:WDAY, this leadership shift arrives after a mixed share price experience. The stock trades at $147.18,...
